sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114658" key="xrhsmodosi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμο-δοσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a giving of oracles,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:184:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184.6</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
